$comment: Movate brand palette for MDK Grafana dashboards. NOT an importable dashboard -- a machine-readable companion to README.md so the same hex values can be referenced from tooling / future dashboards. Grafana has no global 'theme variable' primitive, so the palette is applied per-panel (fieldConfig.color.fixedColor + thresholds[].color). See README.md 'How to apply' + 'How to retrofit'.
name: movate
description: Movate brand palette for executive + ops-wall MDK dashboards.
